brand.name: Bugatti Sound
brand.tagline: The music pool for top DJs

common.previewOnly: Preview only — upgrade to Premium for full download

hero.title: Music for DJs that hits like a Bugatti
hero.subtitle: Discover, preview, and download fresh tracks across every style. Built for clubs, radio, and the road.

items.title: Curated catalog
items.body: Hip-Hop, House, EDM, Reggaeton, Phonk and more — all moderated.

items.title: Crystal-clear previews
items.body: Listen to 30-second previews on any device, no signup required.

items.title: Premium downloads
items.body: Subscribe once, download every approved track in full quality.

items.title: Animated covers
items.body: Upload looping video or animated artwork — your tracks pop on every screen.

auth.telegramHint: Clicking opens a Telegram window — confirm to sign in.
auth.socialOnlyHint: Sign in with Google or Telegram — no password to remember. More providers coming soon.
auth.telegramErrorInvalid: We couldn't verify your Telegram sign-in. Please try again.
auth.telegramErrorConfig: Telegram sign-in isn't available right now. Try Google.
auth.googleOnlyHint: We use Google for sign-in so you never have to manage a separate password. More providers coming soon.
auth.checkEmail: Check your email to confirm your address.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.forgotIntro: Enter your email and we'll send a link to reset your password.
auth.forgotSent: Reset link sent. Check your inbox (and spam folder).
auth.resetIntro: Choose a new password to sign back in.
auth.resetSuccess: Password updated. You're now signed in.
auth.resetNoSession: This link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.

catalog.title: Catalog
catalog.noResults: No tracks match your filters yet.
catalog.emptyBody: Bugatti Sound is in its founding-releases phase. Be one of the first artists — upload your first track and it will land in the catalog right after moderation.

upload.title: Upload a track
upload.intro: Tracks are reviewed by our team before they appear in the public catalog.
upload.style: Style (e.g. afro house, drill, latin pop)
upload.coverVideo: Cover video / animation (mp4, webm, gif — optional)
upload.successBody: Thanks! An admin will review your track shortly. You can track its status in your dashboard.

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.free: You are on the Free plan.
subscription.noCard: No card linked. Auto-renewal is off — your subscription will not renew automatically at the end of the period.
subscription.unbindConfirm: Sure? Your card will be unlinked and auto-renewal will turn off. Premium stays active until the end of the paid period.

myTracks.title: My tracks
myTracks.empty: You haven't uploaded any tracks yet.

admin.title: Moderation
admin.deleteConfirm: Delete this track permanently? All files will also be removed.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Free to listen. Premium to download.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

earlyProducers.title: Be the first artist.
earlyProducers.body: We just opened the doors. Early artists get maximum exposure, a spot in Trending, and a 'founding artist' badge on their profile. Upload your track — it will land in the catalog after a quick review.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By using Bugatti Sound, you agree to the terms below. Please read them carefully.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: We respect your privacy and only process data as described in this policy.

requisites.title: Business details
requisites.intro: Information about the service owner, as required by Russian law.
